name: Community - V2 - 2.2 - Telegram Distribution Processor Thang (bak)

parameters.jsCode:
const distributionTarget  = $node["env"].json["DistributionTarget"];
const driveAccount = 'tuan@gnok.top'

const query = 
`
SELECT t.Id, t.[Type], t.Text, t.MediaLink
FROM XinhTelegramMedia t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT TOP 1 m.MessageGroupedId
    FROM XinhTelegramMedia m
    LEFT JOIN XinhDistributionLog d ON m.Id = d.SourceId AND d.DistributionTarget <> '${ distributionTarget["Username"] }'
    WHERE d.SourceId IS NULL
      AND m.Status = 'APPROVED'
      AND m.DriveAccount = '${ driveAccount }'
    ORDER BY NEWID()
) AS sub ON t.MessageGroupedId = sub.MessageGroupedId
WHERE t.Status = 'APPROVED'
  AND t.DriveAccount = '${ driveAccount }';
`

return {
  query: query
}

parameters.content:
Replaced by Download Request & Download Media, reason:
1. We use upload file instead of downloadable link (Lark doesn't provide it)

parameters.query:
SELECT TOP 1 g.Id, g.ChatId, 'https://t.me/' + g.Username as Link, g.Username, b.Token, g.GroupType
FROM TelegramGroups g
JOIN TelegramUserBots b ON g.DistributeBot = b.Username
WHERE g.GroupType = '{{ `HAI` }}'
    AND g.SyncStatus = 'SYNCED'
    AND g.[Type] = 'channel'
    AND (DATEPART(hour, GETDATE()) * 60 + DATEPART(minute, GETDATE())) % g.DistributeIntervalMinute <= {{ 1000 }};

SELECT t.Id, t.[Type], t.[Text], t.MediaLink, t.ChatId, ca.Credentials
FROM XinhTelegramMedia t
JOIN CommunityAccount ca ON t.DriveAccount = ca."User"
WHERE t.Id = 44640

parameters.content:
Replaced by GetMediaToDeliver, reason:
1. Reduce Code node
2. This currently get the media suitable to GG Drive

#### This can be reuse for different platform, just pass in:
1. DistributionTarget - Link (from distribution log)
2. Type of group (XINH, HAI, ...)
#### Then get the suitable media to distribute

#### Replaced by the Telegram Distribution, reason:
1. Because we not use downloadable link, so need to attach file, but HTTP Request Node can not attach multiple file
##### We using BOT_TOKEN from decrypt not to login as Bot and send message.

parameters.query:
WITH TopRecord AS
(
    SELECT TOP 1 x.Id, x."Type", "Text", MediaLink , MessageGroupedId, x.ChatId
    FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
    JOIN TelegramGroupSource tg ON x.ChatId = tg.ChatId
    WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM XinhDistributionLog xl
        WHERE x.Id = xl.SourceId AND DistributionTarget <> '{{ $json.Link }}'
    )
    --AND "Status"  = 'APPROVED' -- THIS LINE WILL BE UNCOMMENT
    AND MediaLink NOT LIKE 'https://drive.google.com%' -- THIS LINE MAY BE REMOVED
    AND MessageGroupedId IS NOT NULL -- THIS LINE WILL BE REMOVED
    AND tg.GroupType = '{{ $json.GroupType }}'
    AND x."Type" = 'FileType.PHOTO' -- THIS LINE WILL BE REMOVED 
)
SELECT x.Id, x."Type", x."Text", x.MediaLink, x.MessageGroupedId, ChatId, ca.Credentials
FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
JOIN CommunityAccount ca ON x.DriveAccount = ca."User"
WHERE 
    (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) IS NULL 
    AND x.Id = (SELECT Id FROM TopRecord)
    OR 
    ( x.MessageGroupedId = (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) AND x.ChatId = (SELECT ChatId from TopRecord)  )

parameters.content: Sử dụng code bên dưới vì perf tốt hơn
